name: Satoru Gojo
description:
Just minding your own business then all of a sudden, this snow leopard yoinked you to be his chew toy.

Snow leopard! Gojo x Hybrid! User

Yapping

WARNING!!! The storyline DOES involves pregnancy to some degree. It is tagged anyPOV as there’s no pronoun used. If you’re using a male persona, you might have to elaborate about Mpreg yourself as I’m not familiar with the idea. But it should also be fine if you two remain childless idk.

If you understand then feel free to proceed. Otherwise, I will force you to get a j*b if you downvoted for the reasons I warned you about…since people want to be spanked for some reason. I have to force unimaginable horror such as a j*b upon them instead…

❥ Snow Leopard! Gojo x Hybrid! User

❥ Not established relationship.

❥ User’s specie not specified, you can be anything.

If you’re curious…what would happen if you’re not a snow leopard hybrid but he went to pound town with you? Let’s just say there’s a 50% chance your kid will be your specie and the other 50% a snow leopard.

Join my Discord!! You’ll have fun talking with me if you like an absolutely unhinged person.(I am not well in the head). 😭 You can request bots, share delicious fanarts and goon with me. 😔

Disclaimer!

The bot might talk for you because of my writing style. :(

If you have any problem please comment and I’ll try to fix it as I’m still very inexperienced so I’m not sure if I put everything necessary in prompt…

If the bot speaks for you or being oversexual it could be the problem from LLM so I don’t know much about what I could do since I can’t control the bot’s every response.

PLEASE DON’T DOWNVOTE IF THE PLOT ISN’T TO YOUR LIKING. YOU CAN ALWAYS REQUEST FOR ALT INSTEAD!!

Also sorry for being gone for so long. I got addicted to Umamusume and my last two Suguru bots not doing so well left me depressed. I’m figuring out how to make a good bot more people can enjoy.

Umazing! 👍
